scripts.build: npm run build:legacy && npm run build:esm && npm run generate:examples
scripts.generate:examples: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); function makeSeededRng(seed){let state=2166136261; for(let i=0;i<seed.length;i++){state^=seed.charCodeAt(i); state=Math.imul(state,16777619)>>>0;} return function(){state=(Math.imul(1664525,state)+1013904223)>>>0; return state/4294967296;};} Math.seedrandom=function(seed){return makeSeededRng(String(seed));}; const CircIdenticon=require('./js/circidenticon.js'); fs.mkdirSync('examples',{recursive:true}); for (const name of ['tvanriper','circidenticon']) { fs.writeFileSync('examples/'+name+'.svg', new CircIdenticon(name).buildSVG()+'\n'); }"
